senses.gloss: elative degree of سَيِّئ (sayyiʔ):; worse, eviler; worst, evilest
elative degree of سَيِّئ (sayyiʔ):; more abominable; most abominable
elative degree of سَيِّئ (sayyiʔ):; fouler; foulest
elative degree of سَيِّئ (sayyiʔ):; unseemlier, unsightlier, uglier; unseemliest, unsightliest, ugliest

etymology.text:
Elative of سَيِّئ (sayyiʔ, “bad, evil; abominable; foul; unseemly”).

Color or defect adjective from the root س و ء (s w ʔ).
